title: Semiconductor package
abstract: A semiconductor package structure includes a first redistribution layer, a first semiconductor die, a second through via, a molding material, a second semiconductor die, and a second redistribution layer. The first semiconductor die is disposed over the first redistribution layer and includes a first through via having a first width. The second through via is adjacent to the first semiconductor die and has a second width. The second width is greater than the first width. The molding material surrounds the first semiconductor die and the second through via. The second semiconductor die is disposed over the molding material and is electrically coupled to the first through via and the second through via. The second redistribution layer is disposed over the second semiconductor die.
claims:
一種半導體封裝結構，包括：
        第一重分佈層；
        第一半導體晶粒，設置在該第一重分佈層上方並且包括具有第一寬度的第一通孔；
        第二通孔，與該第一半導體晶粒相鄰，並且具有大於該第一寬度的第二寬度；
        模塑材料，圍繞該第一半導體晶粒和該第二通孔；
        第二半導體晶粒，設置在該模塑材料上方，並電耦接到該第一通孔和該第二通孔；以及
        第二重分佈層，設置在該第二半導體晶粒上方。
      A semiconductor packaging structure, comprising:
        first redistribution layer;
        a first semiconductor die disposed over the first redistribution layer and including a first via having a first width;
        a second via, adjacent to the first semiconductor die, and having a second width greater than the first width;
        a molding material surrounding the first semiconductor die and the second via;
        a second semiconductor die disposed over the molding material and electrically coupled to the first via and the second via; and
        The second redistribution layer is arranged on the second semiconductor crystal grain.

如請求項1之半導體封裝結構，其中，該第一寬度為2微米至18微米，該第二寬度為40微米至80微米。The semiconductor package structure according to claim 1, wherein the first width is 2 microns to 18 microns, and the second width is 40 microns to 80 microns.

如請求項1之半導體封裝結構，其中，還包括凸塊結構，該凸塊結構連接該第一半導體晶粒與該第二半導體晶粒。The semiconductor package structure according to claim 1, further comprising a bump structure connecting the first semiconductor die and the second semiconductor die.

如請求項3之半導體封裝結構，其中，還包括第三半導體晶粒，該第三半導體晶粒由該模塑材料所包圍，其中該第三半導體晶粒包括具有第三寬度的第三通孔，該第三寬度小於該第二寬度。The semiconductor package structure according to claim 3, further comprising a third semiconductor die surrounded by the molding material, wherein the third semiconductor die includes a third via hole having a third width , the third width is smaller than the second width.

如請求項1之半導體封裝結構，還包括第三重分佈層，設置在該第一半導體晶粒和該第二半導體晶粒之間並且將該第二半導體晶粒電耦接到該第一通孔和該第二通孔。The semiconductor package structure according to claim 1, further comprising a third redistribution layer disposed between the first semiconductor die and the second semiconductor die and electrically coupling the second semiconductor die to the first via hole and the second through hole.

如請求項5之半導體封裝結構，其中，還包括由該模塑材料圍繞的第三半導體晶粒，其中該第三半導體晶粒包括第三通孔，該第三通孔具有小於該第二寬度的第三寬度。The semiconductor package structure according to claim 5, further comprising a third semiconductor die surrounded by the molding material, wherein the third semiconductor die includes a third via hole, and the third via hole has a width smaller than the second width the third width of .

如請求項1之半導體封裝結構，其中，還包括中介層，設置於該第一重分佈層與該第二半導體晶粒之間，該中介層包括深溝槽電容器。The semiconductor package structure according to claim 1, further comprising an interposer disposed between the first redistribution layer and the second semiconductor die, the interposer comprising deep trench capacitors.
如請求項7之半導體封裝結構，其中，該中介層包括該第二通孔。The semiconductor package structure according to claim 7, wherein the interposer includes the second via hole.

如請求項7之半導體封裝結構，其中，還包括第三重分佈層，設置於該中介層與該第二半導體晶粒之間，並將該第二半導體晶粒電耦接至該深溝槽電容器。The semiconductor package structure according to claim 7, further comprising a third redistribution layer disposed between the interposer and the second semiconductor die, and electrically coupling the second semiconductor die to the deep trench capacitor .

如請求項1之半導體封裝結構，其中，還包括第三通孔，直接設置於該第二通孔上方且具有大於該第一寬度的第三寬度。The semiconductor package structure according to claim 1, further comprising a third through hole directly disposed above the second through hole and having a third width greater than the first width.

如請求項10之半導體封裝結構，還包括第三重分佈層，設置在該第一半導體晶粒和該第二半導體晶粒之間並且電耦接到該第二半導體晶粒、該第一通孔、該第二通孔、該第三通孔和該第三重分佈層。The semiconductor package structure according to claim 10, further comprising a third redistribution layer disposed between the first semiconductor die and the second semiconductor die and electrically coupled to the second semiconductor die, the first pass hole, the second through hole, the third through hole and the third redistribution layer.

如請求項1之半導體封裝結構，還包括第三通孔，直接設置在該第一半導體晶粒上方並且具有大於該第一寬度的第三寬度。The semiconductor package structure according to claim 1, further comprising a third via hole directly disposed above the first semiconductor die and having a third width greater than the first width.

如請求項12之半導體封裝結構，其中，還包括第三重分佈層，設置於該第二半導體晶粒與該第二通孔之間以及該第一半導體晶粒與該第三通孔之間。The semiconductor package structure according to claim 12, further comprising a third redistribution layer disposed between the second semiconductor die and the second through hole and between the first semiconductor die and the third through hole .

一種半導體封裝結構，包括：

        first redistribution layer;

如請求項14之半導體封裝結構，其中，還包括模塑材料，圍繞該第一半導體晶粒、該第二半導體晶粒、該第二通孔以及該第三通孔。The semiconductor package structure according to claim 14, further comprising a molding material surrounding the first semiconductor die, the second semiconductor die, the second through hole and the third through hole.

如請求項14之半導體封裝結構，還包括：

      Such as the semiconductor package structure of claim 14, further comprising:
        a third redistribution layer disposed between the first semiconductor die and the second semiconductor die;
        a first molding material surrounding the first semiconductor die and the second via; and
        The second molding material surrounds the second semiconductor crystal grain and the third through hole.

如請求項17之半導體封裝結構，其中，該第三通孔電性耦接該第三重分佈層與該第二重分佈層。The semiconductor package structure according to claim 17, wherein the third via hole is electrically coupled to the third redistribution layer and the second redistribution layer.

一種半導體封裝結構，包括：

      A semiconductor packaging structure, comprising:

        an interposer disposed on the first redistribution layer and including vias and deep trench capacitors;
        a semiconductor die disposed over the interposer and electrically coupled to the via and the deep trench capacitor; and

The semiconductor package structure of the present invention includes: a first redistribution layer; a first semiconductor grain disposed above the first redistribution layer and including a first through hole with a first width; a second through hole connected to the first through hole A semiconductor grain is adjacent and has a second width greater than the first width; a molding material surrounding the first semiconductor grain and the second through hole; a second semiconductor grain disposed above the molding material , and electrically coupled to the first via hole and the second via hole; and a second redistribution layer disposed over the second semiconductor die. The semiconductor package structure of the present invention includes a plurality of stacked semiconductor grains (first semiconductor grain and second semiconductor grain) instead of one large semiconductor grain, which can reduce manufacturing cost and difficulty, and can improve yield and performance . In addition, since thermal coupling is avoided, heat dissipation efficiency can be enhanced.

The

102 and the
second redistribution layer
124 may each include one or a plurality of conductive layers disposed in one or a plurality of passivation layers. The conductive layer may be formed of conductive materials including copper, aluminum, tungsten, etc., alloys thereof, or combinations thereof. Of course, the above-mentioned process is only an example, and the manufacturing sequence of the semiconductor package structure can be freely designed according to actual needs, and is not limited to the above-mentioned manufacturing sequence. For example, the first semiconductor die 108 may include an SRAM fabricated at a mature node, and the second semiconductor die 120 may include an SoC fabricated at an advanced node. Mature nodes include, for example, 28nm and 32nm processes, and advanced nodes include, for example, 10nm and 7nm processes. In addition, the manufacturing process and the formed semiconductor package structure (such as the
semiconductor package structure
100 , etc.) in the embodiment of the present invention are based on wafer (wafer form) manufacturing. Specifically, the semiconductor package structure of the embodiment of the present invention is a structure formed in the same manufacturing process as the crystal grain (not a structure formed by packaging after the crystal grain is manufactured and diced or a chip (chip) is formed. ) stacked structure), so the structure in the embodiment of the present invention is also different from package-on-package (or package stacking, stacked package). In addition, the embodiments of the present invention are based on the wafer manufacturing process, in which the silicon-containing material is manufactured in a wafer factory, which is different from the manufacturing process of encapsulating chips. Moreover, in the embodiment of the present invention, the semiconductor package structure (such as the
semiconductor package structure
100, etc.) will be packaged into a chip (chip), for example, based on the
semiconductor package structure
100 to form a wiring substrate, a fan-out substrate, etc., and then form a chip . In a word, the manufacturing process and the formed structure in the embodiment of the present invention are based on the packaging structure in the form of a wafer; the manufacturing process includes the manufacturing of silicon-containing materials (for example, the first semiconductor die 108 and the second semiconductor die 120 or their surrounding silicon materials), and these silicon-containing materials are not processed and manufactured during packaging.

Rather than one semiconductor die containing all required functions, the present invention employs partitions of the semiconductor die (including first semiconductor die 108 and second semiconductor die 120 ), each of which includes some of the required functions. Therefore, manufacturing cost and difficulty can be reduced, and yield and performance can be improved. In the embodiment of the present invention, the crystal grains are stacked, so the plane area occupied by the grains can be reduced, and compared with manufacturing a grain with a larger plane area, this method of the embodiment of the present invention can significantly The manufacturing difficulty and manufacturing cost are reduced, and it can also facilitate the miniaturization of semiconductor packaging. In addition, since thermal coupling is avoided, thermal performance can be enhanced; that is, the way of die stacking can increase the heat dissipation path of the die and improve the efficiency of heat dissipation.

To sum up, the semiconductor package structure includes semiconductor die partitions (including a plurality of semiconductor dies stacked vertically) instead of one large semiconductor die, which can reduce manufacturing cost and difficulty, and can improve yield and performance. Furthermore, thermal behavior can be enhanced (enhanced cooling efficiency) since thermal coupling is avoided.

In some embodiments, a semiconductor package structure includes a deep trench capacitor disposed between a top semiconductor die and a front redistribution layer. Deep trench capacitors are located closer to the top semiconductor die than capacitors placed under the front-side redistribution layer. Therefore, electrical performance can be further improved. In addition, more bump structures can be disposed under the front redistribution layer for electrical coupling.
